name: Drop
description: Drop is an open-source game distribution platform designed to provide a Steam-like experience for DRM-free games with library management and download capabilities.

notes.text: First startup may take several minutes to complete database migrations and initialization.
Games are stored in /opt/drop/data/library by default.
Requires sufficient disk space for game library storage.
Build process includes Rust compilation which may take 10-15 minutes.
